name: Stir-Fried Oysters with Garlic and Green Onions
recipeInstructions:
Note: Gingerroot should be chopped.
Bring 4 cups water to boil in a large saucepan. Add oysters and cook for 10 to 15 seconds, until edges begin to curl. Remove with a slotted spoon to paper towels to drain. Mix cornstarch with 2 tablespoons water until smooth. Stir in oyster sauce, soy sauce, and salt. Set aside.
Heat oil in a wok until hot. Add white wine, oysters, garlic, green onions, and ginger. Stir-fry for 15 seconds. Remove any excess liquid that accumulates. Stir in the reserved sauce. Stir-fry for 1 minute, just until the sauce bubbles and thickens.
